resultList.dtldesc: Experience premium urban living in this elegantly designed 3 BHK apartment located in the prestigious Sector 36A. Situated within the renowned Krisumi Waterfall Residences, this ready-to-move residence combines luxury, comfort, and modern architecture in one of Gurgaons rapidly developing residential corridors. Positioned near Ellan Miracle Mall, the property offers seamless connectivity along with proximity to prominent commercial, educational, and healthcare facilities, making it an ideal choice for contemporary family living.Property SpecificationsThis semi-furnished apartment is spread across a super built-up area of 1967 sq. ft with a carpet area of 1060 sq. ft, offering a thoughtfully planned layout that balances style and functionality. Located on the 3rd floor of a 30-storey residential tower, the apartment features 3 spacious bedrooms, 2 well-appointed bathrooms, and 2 balconies that allow ample natural light and ventilation throughout the home.The living and dining spaces are designed in a combined layout, creating an open and welcoming atmosphere ideal for both daily living and entertaining guests. The apartment comes with a modular kitchen fitted with a chimney, ensuring convenience and efficient space utilisation. Wooden flooring enhances the sophistication of the interiors while adding warmth and elegance to the living environment.The residence is Vaastu compliant and north facing, appealing to buyers who value harmonious design principles. The property also includes 1 covered parking space for secure vehicle accommodation. Being a ready-to-move resale apartment in a newly constructed development, it offers the advantage of immediate possession within a premium gated community.FacilitiesResidents of the development enjoy access to modern lifestyle amenities designed for convenience, recreation, and security. The property provides 24-hour water supply, 100 power backup, security personnel, CCTV surveillance, and multiple lifts for smooth accessibility within the tower. Visitor parking and service or goods lift facilities further enhance daily convenience. The project is known for offering a modern residential environment with premium amenities suited for comfortable urban living.LocalitySector 36A is emerging as one of Gurgaons promising residential destinations due to its strategic connectivity and infrastructure growth. The apartment enjoys proximity to Ellan Miracle Mall along with supermarkets, banks, and essential social conveniences. Schools and hospitals are located within approximately 4 to 5 km, while metro connectivity is available within around 5 km, ensuring smooth daily commuting. The area offers excellent connectivity to major road networks and commercial hubs, making it highly suitable for professionals and families alike. Combining luxury living, accessibility, and strong investment potential, this residence presents an exceptional opportunity in Gurgaons premium real estate market.
